name: Roller Replacement & Frame Repair
description: Worn-out rollers are the #1 reason pocket doors stick, drag, or jump off the track. We replace rollers with contractor-grade hardware matched to your door's weight and realign the frame so it glides like new.

name: Lock Repair
description: A pocket door lock that won't latch defeats the purpose of the door. We repair and replace mortise locks, privacy locks, and passage hardware — restoring full security and function in a single visit.

name: Hinge Repair & Replacement
description: Squeaking, sagging, or misaligned hinges cause pocket doors to bind and wear unevenly. We diagnose the root cause — not just the symptom — and replace hinges with hardware rated for years of daily use.

name: Commercial Door Installation
description: Offices, medical facilities, restaurants, and retail spaces trust us for pocket door installations that meet commercial-grade standards. We handle framing, hardware, ADA compliance considerations, and post-drywall adjustments.

name: Commercial Door Repair
description: High-traffic commercial pocket doors take a beating. We repair tracks, rollers, frames, and panels — minimizing downtime so your business keeps running. Same-day emergency service available.

name: Commercial Door Lock Services
description: From privacy locks in medical exam rooms to high-security commercial hardware, we install, rekey, and repair locking systems built for the demands of business environments.
